non_compliance_flags.message: GFCI required by NEC 210.8(B) on counter/customer-area + prep-area receptacles (C02, C07). 10mA Class A GFCI per UL 943. Display refrigeration motor circuits (C03, C04, C05) and POS dedicated (C06) protected by feeder-side GFEP at the upstream cooler controller per NEC 426/427 hardline cold-line practice; not on the panelboard GFCI. Verify with AHJ at tenant fit-out commissioning.

Neutral current 21.7 A is 37.2% of the largest phase (L2 = 58.3 A). Per NFPA 70 Article 220.61: single-phase load distribution best practice — rebalance recommended. Re-allocate one or more circuits between phases to reduce neutral loading and improve voltage symmetry.
non_compliance_flags.code_clause: IEC 60364-5-52:2009 § 524.2.2 + NFPA 70 Article 220.61 (single-phase load distribution / neutral sizing)

assumptions: Diversity factor 0.8 applied to combined tenant load per NEC 220.61 commercial retail / food-service.
Selectivity verification deferred (tool_call_pending) per WI3 — fault-level intent absent, engineer Ifault not declared.
Cable ampacity check assumes NEC Table 310.16 (THWN-2 in conduit, 30°C ambient): 14 AWG Cu = 20 A; 12 AWG Cu = 25 A; 10 AWG Cu = 35 A. All In ≤ Iz.
EGC sizing per NEC 250.122 — 12 AWG Cu EGC for 20A circuits, 10 AWG Cu EGC for 30A walk-in cooler, 14 AWG Cu EGC for 15A HVAC control.
Type D curve MCBs on C03/C04/C05 motor-load refrigeration circuits per NEC 430 — accommodate compressor LRA (locked-rotor amperes) inrush without nuisance trip.
GFCI 10mA Class A on C02 (counter/customer) + C07 (prep area receptacles) per NEC 210.8(B). C06 POS dedicated exempt per NEC 210.8(B) exception (dedicated electronic data-processing equipment).
Display refrigeration C03/C04 dedicated motor circuits per NEC 422.16(B) — not on receptacle GFCI; cord-and-plug-connected commercial refrigeration equipment has its own UL listing.
C09 suite emergency lighting circuit has NO GFCI per NEC 700.6 / NFPA 101 life-safety availability principle.

rationale.chat_summary: 100A 208Y/120V 3-phase NEMA Type 1 tenant sub-panel for Suite 200 specialty food-service retail tenant (cheese + deli). 9 circuits sized per NEC Table 310.16 (10 AWG / 12 AWG / 14 AWG). Type D MCBs on motor refrigeration circuits (C03/C04 display reefer, C05 walk-in cooler) per NEC 430. GFCI per NEC 210.8(B) on counter + prep receptacles. Emergency lighting C09 exempt per NEC 700.6. Selectivity deferred (tool_call_pending). Reply to refine, e.g. 'add prep-area three-compartment sink GFCI' or 'add ice machine dedicated circuit'.

sections.title: Board Classification
sections.summary: US NEMA Type 1 panelboard, 100A, 30-way tenant sub-panel for food-service retail. Per NEC Article 408 — maximum 42 overcurrent devices per panelboard section.

decisions.label: NEMA Type 1 enclosure
decisions.summary: Indoor general purpose; tenant service closet.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 208Y/120V 3-phase 4-wire 60 Hz, 100A 2-pole feeder from MSP-A. Tenant sub-feeder Ze 0.10Ω.

decisions.label: 100A 2-pole feeder
decisions.summary: Standard US tenant sub-panel rating, matched to upstream MSP-A breaker.
decisions.rule: NEC tenant feeder sizing per NEC 220 load calculation

sections.title: Busbar Sizing
sections.summary: 100A busbar matches feeder rating, IcW 10 kA. Sum of loads 16.6 kW (~48A diversified at 208V 3-phase). 100A busbar has 50% headroom — appropriate for food-service tenant.

decisions.label: 100A busbar IcW 10 kA
decisions.summary: Sized to match feeder OCPD at MSP-A.

sections.title: Way Assignment
sections.summary: 9 ways used (9 × single-pole MCBs W1-W9), 21 ways spare. Heavier motor + refrigeration loading vs apparel tenant (TSP-A).

sections.title: OCPD Selection
sections.summary: Branch circuits sized per NEC 240. 20A circuits on 12 AWG (25A ampacity). 30A walk-in cooler on 10 AWG (35A ampacity). 15A HVAC control on 14 AWG (20A ampacity). All In ≤ Iz pass.

decisions.label: Type D MCB on motor refrigeration circuits
decisions.summary: C03 (display reefer 1), C04 (display reefer 2), C05 (walk-in condensing) — Type D handles compressor LRA inrush.

sections.title: RCD Strategy
sections.summary: NEC 210.8(B) commercial GFCI applies. 10mA Class A GFCI on C02 (counter/customer recpts) + C07 (prep area receptacles). Motor refrigeration C03/C04/C05 not on receptacle GFCI (dedicated cord-and-plug or hard-wired equipment per NEC 422.16(B)). C06 POS dedicated exempt per 210.8(B) exception. C09 emergency lighting NO GFCI per NEC 700.6.

decisions.label: GFCI per NEC 210.8(B)
decisions.summary: Counter + prep receptacles GFCI; motor circuits dedicated.

sections.title: Cable Selection
sections.summary: THWN-2 copper conductors in EMT conduit per NEC Table 310.16. 10 AWG for the 30A walk-in cooler dedicated circuit (12m run — short enough to ignore voltage-drop concerns).

sections.title: Selectivity Verification
sections.summary: 9 cascade pairs (MSP-A → C01..C09) emitted as tool_call_pending. fault-level intent absent; engineer Ifault not declared.

decisions.label: All cascades tool_call_pending
decisions.rule: NEC 240.4 protection of conductors + 240.86 series ratings

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Compliant. One INFO flag for AHJ GFCI scope verification at tenant fit-out commissioning + one TOOL-CALL-PENDING flag for deferred selectivity.

invariants.evidence: INV-14 board TSP-B (US → NEC): R1 jurisdiction→format mapping (US → NEC 2023 §408.4(A)) holds; R2 board_label.text+svg populated, no {{}} remnants; R3 board_label.text matches NEC format regex; R4 9/9 circuits carry circuit_label.text+svg, no {{}} remnants; R5 every circuit_label.text matches NEC circuit regex; R6 tool_call_pending booleans set on all labels.

INV-15 board TSP-B (US): all 9 circuits carry diversity_basis with valid load_type enum + factor_applied in [0.0, 1.0] (Rule 1 PASS). All citations >=20 chars with recognisable clause markers (Reg / § / OSG / Table / CoP / TM) (Rule 2 PASS). Rule 3 N/A (no lift or ev_charger circuits on this board). method_params present where method='largest_plus_remainder_pct' (Rule 4 PASS).
